_comment: Apollo owner-business preferences — TEMPLATE. Copy to runtime/private/apollo-owner-prefs.json (git-ignored) and fill in real values. Apollo + heist/hustler/herald/hit read the runtime file; until it exists they run on this template and every threshold check is a placeholder, not a real guardrail.

finance.notes: min buffer = Heist flags any withdrawal that would drop cash below this; spend threshold = Hustler/Apollo escalate spend at or above this for owner sign-off.

businesses.notes: One entry per separate legal/operational entity. Hustler keeps metrics separate per business.

tax.notes: e.g. federal + state/province; Heist tracks filing deadlines against these.
